body.docName: 查询公司付款账户详情
body.docCnt:
##接口调用地址 
 生产环境地址：https://api.cmbchina.com/itrip/xft-api/v1/pay/account/detail 
 测试环境地址：https://api.cmburl.cn:8065/itrip/xft-api/uat/v1/pay/account/detail 
 ## 接口描述 
公司账户根据账号查询详情 
## 调用方式 
 METHOD: POST  
 CONTENT-TYPE: application/json 
## 接口输入参数 
 <restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"header","type":"OBJECT","desc":"请求头根节点","label":"请求头根节点"}}]</restparamstable><restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"body","type":"OBJECT","desc":"请求体根节点","label":"请求体根节点"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"payAcctNum","required":true,"label":"%E8%B4%A6%E6%88%B7%E5%8F%B7","exampleValue":"NzY5ODU0NzM5ODY1NzM0OTc%3D","desc":"%20Base64%E5%8A%A0%E5%AF%86%0A%0A%E7%B2%BE%E7%A1%AE%E6%90%9C%E7%B4%A2"}}]}]</restparamstable><restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"query","type":"OBJECT","desc":"query根节点","label":"query根节点"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"OPAUID","label":"%E4%BC%81%E4%B8%9A%E5%8F%B7","exampleValue":"XFT00001"}}]}]</restparamstable>

## 接口调用示例 
 #### 请求报文
```json
{
    "payAcctNum": "NzY5ODU0NzM5ODY1NzM0OTc="
}
```
#### 响应报文
```json
{
    "data": {
        "payAcctBankNum": null,
        "payAcctBankName": null,
        "payAcctBranchBankNum": null,
        "payAcctBranchBankName": null,
        "payAcctProvinceSixCode": null,
        "payAcctProvinceName": null,
        "payAcctCitySixCode": null,
        "payAcctCityName": null,
        "payAcctName": "自定义账户测试01",
        "payAcctNum": "NzY5ODU0NzM5ODY1NzM0OTc=",
        "payAcctUseType": "3",
        "payAcctIsMain": "0",
        "payAcctRemark": "aw ",
        "payAcctStatus": "1",
        "crtTime": "2024-03-26 15:54:22",
        "revTime": "2024-04-18 09:38:44",
        "payAcctOwnerOrgLpcCode": "Fx6000000",
        "payAcctOwnerOrgName": "xx的公司_修改",
        "accountType": "CUSTOM",
        "companyName": null,
        "wthrDigitalYuanMainAcct": null,
        "customFieldValues": [
            {
                "customFieldCode": "INPUT_112703086",
                "customFieldValue": "尽快答复",
                "customFieldName": "自定义账户的单行文本",
                "multiValues": null
            },
            {
                "customFieldCode": "INFINITY_SELECT_170716974",
                "customFieldValue": null,
                "customFieldName": "下拉选择",
                "multiValues": [
                    {
                        "id": "选项3",
                        "name": "选项3",
                        "code": null
                    }
                ]
            }
        ]
    },
    "success": true,
    "message": "调用成功！"
}
```  
## 错误码说明 
| 错误码| 错误信息|是否成功|
  | --- | --- |---|
  | success| true|是|


success为true时为成功其余全部为失败
